heroHeadline: Pahalgam Attack First Anniversary: Army Issues 'Some Boundaries Should Never Be Crossed' Warning; India Sidelined as Pakistan Shapes Iran-US Diplomacy
heroSubtitle: On the eve of the first anniversary of the Pahalgam massacre (April 22, 2025), the Indian Army recalled Operation Sindoor and declared 'Justice is served — India does not forget,' while a full security grid was deployed across J&K's tourist spots and shrines. As New Delhi prepares the 'Human Cost of Terrorism' exhibition at US Capitol Hill, analysis warns India is watching from the sidelines as Pakistan gains unprecedented diplomatic capital by brokering the Iran-US process — with Jaishankar's 'dalal nation' jibe highlighting India's frustration over its absence from the region's defining diplomatic moment.
footerNote: Data sourced from Indian MEA/MOD, Pakistan ISPR/MFA, UN Security Council, SIPRI, Crisis Group, HRW, Stimson Center
